summary: Session 18 testing complete. ALL FEATURES VERIFIED: (1) Jest suite 155/155 tests passing (+7 quick_action_chips tests), (2) Axe-core a11y audit button (data-testid='preview-audit-a11y') present in PreviewTab toolbar, (3) Quick action chips (data-testid='quick-action-chips') visible above ChatComposer when messages.length > 1, (4) All generic chips verified: change-color, add-page, mobile-pass, copy-rewrite, tighten-ui, (5) Archetype-specific chip 'add-feature' visible for SaaS tool project, (6) Previously shipped features verified: Versions button (hub-versions-btn), Backend button (hub-backend-btn), Deploy result chip.

PASS: Versions button (hub-versions-btn) present - previously shipped feature verified
PASS: Backend button (hub-backend-btn) present - previously shipped feature verified
PASS: Dashboard loads with no console errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 18 complete. Quick action chips added above ChatComposer - only visible when messages.length > 1. Archetype-specific chips appear based on briefProgress.archetype.id in message metadata. Axe-core a11y audit button added to PreviewTab toolbar - lazy-loads axe-core from CDN when clicked.
